prompt: A precision instrument dial visualising an agent lifecycle as orbital data-states: BIRTH at top, OPERATION at centre, TERMINATION at bottom. Concentric engraved rings, a degree graticule 00/45/90/135/180/225/270/315, a dashed transition path, small checkpoint and termination marks. linework on a deep near-black ground #0E1412, a single mint-teal #3BE0C0 accent, softly rounded corners and smooth strokes, on-chain trading-terminal aesthetic; no colour except the one teal accent. the same austere technical register as Revenant but darker — an on-chain trading-terminal energy.
